summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 14 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 53 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 34 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 15 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 3 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 36 days past due with 14 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $24,741 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 24 days past due with 13 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 12. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 5 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 4 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $30,817 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

153 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **71 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 18 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$66,813 in payments going out this week** across 35 tasks — make sure funds are available. $10,506 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Katie Holmes & Sean Springs and Ginger Brown — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco has 7 overdue across 2 projects with 1 tasks active.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 4 overdue — oldest first. 2 upcoming unassigned. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 3 overdue — oldest first. 2 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 17 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — oldest first. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 34 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 4. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 14 overdue (oldest: 36d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **15 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 24 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 9. Keep the momentum going.

**Ginger Brown:** 13 overdue (oldest: 24d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 24 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 12 overdue — oldest first. **14 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 14 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 5 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **15 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 22 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
